title: lecanorchis suginoana
intro: Lecanorchis suginoana, also known as the Sugino orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lecanorchis suginoana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Lecanorchis suginoana are typically made by drying the plant's roots and stems, then infusing them in hot water to create a decoction or tea.
